plugins.name: spitball
plugins.description: Lightweight design conversation that produces a small spitball artifact. Forked from obra/superpowers brainstorming with configurable save location and no auto-handoff to a planning skill.

plugins.name: lineup
plugins.description: Companion to spitball. Manages a rolling 3-slot view (At Bat / On Deck / In the Hole) of work toward a spitball's destination. Two skills: lineup (reviewer) sharpens the next at-bat; at-bat (implementer) does the work with red/green testing.
